title: Savory Russian Sea Bass Broil
description: A low-sodium-friendly savory dish featuring tender sea bass fillets cooked to perfection under a broiler, ideal for midnight cravings.
instructions: Cut each garlic clove in half and press them into the flesh of the sea bass fillets, making sure they are well distributed on all sides.
Slice the red onion thinly and spread it evenly over a baking dish. Top with the sea bass fillets seasoned with lemon zest and minced parsley.
Mix together olive oil, ginger, soy sauce, salt, pepper, and garlic in a small bowl until combined. Pour this marinade mixture over the top of the fish and onions.
Place the baking dish under the broiler for 12-15 minutes or until the sea bass is cooked through (internal temperature reaches at least 145°F/63°C).
Serve hot with a side of steamed vegetables.
